figures.caption: TABLE 3: Evaluation regimes used in the paper and the corresponding validation support. This table defines the evidential role of each regime: reference-only, feasibility screen, or primary same-case evidence.

Fig. 2: Feasibility-only fixed-split summary on the paired X-ray target cohort. Bars show repeated-run means, and overlaid points show per-seed outcomes. The stripped-down plain cross-modal logit-KD control attains the highest mean paired-cohort result, but the per-seed spread shows that this advantage remains unstable on a validation split containing only four patients and four X-ray images (three positive, one negative).

TABLE 6: Status of the five experimental questions under the current evidence scale. “Tentative on fixed split only” denotes an observation that appears on the original four-image paired split but is not preserved under stronger controls.
